title: limniris wilsonii
intro: Limniris wilsonii, also known as the Himalayan iris, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Limniris wilsonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
